ddls:
CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the software package or library */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category it belongs to (e.g., Packages and libraries) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the repository was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the repository was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the repository is active or not */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the repository */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository where the commit was made */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the author who made the commit */,
  "author_date" TEXT /* Date the author made the commit */,
  "committer" TEXT /* Name of the committer who committed the changes */,
  "committer_date" TEXT /* Date the commit was made */,
  "msg" TEXT /* Commit message describing the changes */,
  "files_changed" TEXT /* List of files changed in the commit */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Brief description of the changes made in the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., Diagrams and visualizations) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the tag was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the repository */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the repository was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., admin, read-only) */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the access expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_access_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the issue is reported against */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user reporting the issue */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was created */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* User assigned to resolve the issue */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue (e.g., high, low) */,
  "labels" TEXT /* Labels associated with the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the comment is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "edited_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integration_pipeline" (
  "pipeline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pipeline configuration */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the pipeline is configured for */,
  "pipeline_type" TEXT /* Type of pipeline (e.g., CI, CD) */,
  "config" TEXT /* Pipeline configuration details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pipeline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integration_pipeline_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)
